name: nominal_init
description: Experiment B: 20 seeds x 6 scenarios x 3 modes, coordinator re-initialised to the Paper #1 nominal operating point (integrity/energy/curiosity = 0.75, arousal = 0.5, certainty = 0.5) before per-seed jitter. Directly addresses the Paper #2 reviewer's critique that absolute PerfMean (0.07-0.22) was artifactually low because the default coordinator state is sub-nominal. If the relative RI-reduction effect holds at higher absolute PerfMean, Paper #2's regulation finding is shown to be robust across operating regimes.
